title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. lapponica
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. lapponica, commonly known as Northern kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of saponins and alkaloids. The health benefits of Northern kidney vetch include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support skin health and alleviate various health issues.
